title: Integration for Workflow Enhancement. How to get data between two dates

posts.author: Valeriia.H (Valeriia)
posts.cookedHtml:
In today’s fast-paced business environment, efficient and productive time management is crucial for tracking and managing tasks and projects. Fortunately, Monday.com offers a powerful reporting tool called Time in Status that can enhance task management. Let’s take a closer look at how this app can help improve your workflow and take it to new heights.

image2768×714 190 KB

What is Time in Status on Monday.com?

Time in Status is an app that allows you to analyze the duration spent in each status column of your boards, whether you’re tracking task progress, monitoring project milestones, or evaluating team performance. By tracking the duration spent in each status column of your boards, this app offers actionable data for optimizing workflows and improving productivity.

Features of Time in Status

  1. The app’s features include customizable reports that can be tailored to your specific needs. You can generate a Time in Status report, a Status Count report, or a Transition Count report, and visualize them using pie charts, bar charts, or area charts.

    image2770×254 62.8 KB

  2. The app also provides visual representations of data, such as charts and graphs, making it easier to interpret and analyze the time distribution across different statuses. These visualizations help stakeholders grasp insights at a glance, facilitating data-driven decision-making.

    image660×1000 69.6 KB

  3. Time in Status retains historical data, allowing you to compare current performance with past trends. This capability enables you to assess progress over time and identify areas for improvement or optimization.

    image1920×1018 105 KB

  4. And after all, you can export reports in various formats, such as CSV or Excel, for further analysis or sharing with stakeholders. This feature enhances collaboration and ensures transparency across teams.

    image2706×558 163 KB

Time in Status Report

The Time in Status report shows the total time an item has stayed in each status.

image2664×706 191 KB

The Time in Status data is displayed on the grid calculates in such a way:
For example, the Item was in the Backlog Status for 20 minutes, then moved to the To Do Status. After a while, the Item moved to the Working on it Status and stayed there for 11 hours 27 minutes until it moved to another Status. So the time in the To-Do Status for this Item is 15 hours and 7 minutes.

By generating a Time in Status report, you will be able to track the duration spent in each status category for tasks or projects, aiding in bottleneck identification, workflow optimization, and project management improvement.
Status Count Report

Status Count report

The Status Count report shows how many times an Item has been in each status.
The calculation of the report on the Grid occurs according to the selected period. The Status Count report calculates how much time an Item has moved to each status of the workflow during the particular period.

image2702×464 116 KB

For example, the Item was in the To-Do status (1 time), then moved to the Doing status, and after some time the Item returned to the To-Do status(+1 time). So the status count in the To-Do status for this Item is 2.

image1280×690 30 KB

Status Count is providing insights into workflow efficiency, identifying bottlenecks, and monitoring the progress of tasks or projects.

###Transition Count Report

The Transition Count report shows how many times an Item has moved between each status in the workflow.

image1724×696 50 KB

For example, the Item was in the Working on it status, then moved to the Done status. So, the transition count between Working on it and Done status is 1. Then the Item moved to another status and after a while, the Item returned to the Working on it status, then moved to another status is 2, and then moved back to Done. So the transition count between Working on it and Done status is 3.

image2780×1174 161 KB

The Transition Count report provides a more detailed understanding of the project’s progress.

Takeaway

Time in Status empowers teams to enhance task management and workflow efficiency. I am pleased to offer you a 14-day trial of Time in Status. Furthermore, our add-on is free for up to two team members, allowing you to evaluate its effectiveness in your service processes.
